compatibility.note: Catalog 1.7 corrects and completes the published contract. Manifest payload schema remains 1.5; schema 1.4 is read-only for already stored registrations.

submittedArtifacts.name: evidence
submittedArtifacts.rule: Every manifest evidence reference must resolve to an uploaded allowed text file.

archivePolicy.dependencyVersions: Exact semantic versions only; ranges and tags are rejected.
requiredFiles: at least one src/**/*.test.ts or src/**/*.spec.ts

semanticRules.description: Tool annotations must exactly represent the declared effect class.
contractDigests.inputSchema must equal the canonical SHA-256 digest of tool.inputSchema.
contractDigests.outputSchema must equal the canonical SHA-256 digest of tool.outputSchema.
protocol.errorCatalog and errorCatalog must be canonically identical.
runtime.egressAllowlist and dependencies.networkPolicy.outboundAllowlist must contain the same values.
exportDestinations must be empty when exportAllowed is false.
Every auto-quarantine rule must occur exactly once.
The expected load concurrency must not exceed behavior.maxConcurrency.
staleAfterSeconds must be at least the longest configured probe interval.
reviewDueAt must equal approvedAt plus intervalDays, within one second.
Sensitive services require review within 180 days; all others within 365 days.
The compatibility window must not end before review approval.
Secret reference URIs must be unique.
INITIAL changes require a null previous revision; later changes require a previous revision.
Every evidence reference in the manifest must resolve to an allowed file in the uploaded ZIP.
Both tool schemas must compile as strict JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 documents.

info.title: KCML MCP onboarding programmer API
info.description: Authenticated, idempotent intake for one MCP onboarding job bound to one integration token. /v1/onboardings aliases remain available, but new clients should use the service-onboardings paths documented here.

registerHost.description: Value returned in the authenticated integration intent.

post.summary: Create the onboarding job and upload revision 1

manifest.description: UTF-8 JSON conforming to manifest schema 1.5.

400.description: Invalid request, manifest, archive or optimistic-lock headers.

401.description: Missing, expired, revoked or incorrectly bound integration token.

412.description: If-Match does not equal the current lockVersion.

413.description: HTTP request envelope exceeds the route body limit.

415.description: Multipart or ZIP media type required.

get.summary: Read the token-bound job, gates and transition events

400.description: Invalid request, manifest, archive or optimistic-lock headers.

401.description: Missing, expired, revoked or incorrectly bound integration token.

412.description: If-Match does not equal the current lockVersion.

413.description: HTTP request envelope exceeds the route body limit.

put.summary: Replace a failed or requested revision with a complete manifest and source ZIP

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: Quoted lockVersion ETag returned by the latest job response.

412.description: If-Match does not equal the current lockVersion.

413.description: HTTP request envelope exceeds the route body limit.
